Package com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.rpt.generated.model

  • Class
    Description
    ColumnType
    Gets or Sets ColumnType
    Prediction
    The predicted value for the column.
    Prediction.InnerBigDecimal
    Helper class to create BigDecimal that implements Prediction.
    Prediction.InnerString
    Helper class to create String that implements Prediction.
    PredictionConfig
    Configuration of the prediction model.
    PredictionConfig.Builder
    Builder helper class.
    PredictionPlaceholder
    The placeholder value in any column for which to predict a value.
    PredictionPlaceholder.InnerBigDecimal
    Helper class to create BigDecimal that implements PredictionPlaceholder.
    PredictionPlaceholder.InnerString
    Helper class to create String that implements PredictionPlaceholder.
    PredictionResult
    A single prediction result for a single column in a single row.
    PredictionResult.Builder
    Builder helper class.
    PredictionsInnerValue
    PredictionsInnerValue
    PredictionsInnerValue.InnerInteger
    Helper class to create Integer that implements PredictionsInnerValue.
    PredictionsInnerValue.InnerString
    Helper class to create String that implements PredictionsInnerValue.
    PredictionsInnerValue.ListOfPredictionResults
    Helper class to create List<PredictionResult> that implements PredictionsInnerValue.
    PredictRequestPayload
    Users need to specify a list of rows, which contains both the context rows and the rows for which to predict a label, and a mapping of column names to placeholder values.
    PredictRequestPayload.Builder
    Builder helper class.

    Metadata about the prediction request.
